seed_instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction.
org_constraint: The email must be formatted in JSON with the following keys: "subject" (String), "body" (String), and "signature" (String). The "body" key must contain an Array with exactly three elements, each representing a paragraph of the email.
new_constraint: The email must be formatted in Markdown with at least one level-1 header and one unordered list.
instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction. The email must be formatted in JSON with the following keys: "subject" (String), "body" (String), and "signature" (String). The "body" key must contain an Array with exactly three elements, each representing a paragraph of the email. The email must be formatted in Markdown with at least one level-1 header and one unordered list.
response:
```json
{
  "subject": "Query Regarding Recent Transaction - Account [Your Account Number]",
  "body": [
    "Dear [Bank Name] Customer Service Team,\n\nI am writing to request clarification regarding a recent transaction that appeared on my account statement for the period ending [Date]. The transaction in question is dated [Date of Transaction] for the amount of [Amount] and is listed as [Transaction Description, if known].",
    "As I do not recognize this charge, I would greatly appreciate it if you could provide more details about its origin. Specifically, I am hoping to understand:",
    "  * The merchant or recipient of the funds.\n  * The nature of the transaction.\n  * Any supporting documentation you can provide.\n\nThank you for your time and assistance with this matter. I look forward to your prompt response so I can verify the legitimacy of this charge. Please let me know if you require any further information from my end to investigate this."
  ],
  "signature": "Sincerely,\n[Your Full Name]\n[Your Phone Number]\n[Your Email Address]"
}
```

***

# Transaction Clarification Request

Here is the email content formatted in Markdown:

Dear [Bank Name] Customer Service Team,

I am writing to request clarification regarding a recent transaction that appeared on my account statement for the period ending [Date]. The transaction in question is dated [Date of Transaction] for the amount of [Amount] and is listed as [Transaction Description, if known].

As I do not recognize this charge, I would greatly appreciate it if you could provide more details about its origin. Specifically, I am hoping to understand:

* The merchant or recipient of the funds.
* The nature of the transaction.
* Any supporting documentation you can provide.

Thank you for your time and assistance with this matter. I look forward to your prompt response so I can verify the legitimacy of this charge. Please let me know if you require any further information from my end to investigate this.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>

I look forward to your prompt response so I can verify the legitimacy of this charge. Please let me know if you require any further information from my end to investigate this."
```json
  ],

}
```
